text: Open Source Intel For those of you in the U.S. just getting out of holiday, here’s what you missed. Tuesday – Two Week Ceasefire Announced • The U.S. escalated hard inside Iran. Strikes hit Karaj, Arak, and Bushehr. The Pentagon was actively weighing next steps, including deeper strikes on power plants and strategic and nuclear infrastructure. • Iran responded with a major threat. IRGC officials warned they could choke off oil and gas to the West for years. The Strait of Hormuz was effectively restricted, creating immediate pressure on global energy markets. • Pakistan stepped in to mediate. PM Shehbaz Sharif and Army Chief Asim Munir spoke directly with President Trump and JD Vance. • Trump then announced a 2 week ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran. The condition was clear: Iran must fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz. He described Iran’s 10 point proposal as “workable” and said a deal was close. • Iran’s FM Abbas Araghchi said Iran would guarantee safe passage through the Strait for 2 weeks if attacks on Iran stopped. • Within minutes, missiles were launched toward Israel anyway. Sirens sounded across Tel Aviv and southern Israel. • Core dispute starts here: Iran and Pakistan treated the ceasefire as regional, including Lebanon and Hezbollah. The U.S. and Israel say it only applies to Iran directly. Vance later called this a “misunderstanding.” • Direct U.S. Iran talks were scheduled for Islamabad. Wednesday – ceasefire starts breaking down • The biggest issue: Hormuz never really reopened. Traffic stayed extremely low. Only a handful of vessels moved, mostly not carrying real crude. • The White House said Iran was backing down. Independent shipping data showed the opposite. • U.S. oil executives also got involved directly, pushing back hard against any scenario where Iran controls or taxes shipping through the Strait. • Iran accused the UAE of being involved in strikes on its territory, and Iran hits Saudi energy and gas pipelines and infrastructure. • Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf publicly rejected parts of the ceasefire framework, insisting only Iran’s 10 point plan is acceptable. • Vance clarified the U.S. position: the ceasefire does not apply to Lebanon. He also claimed shipping was improving. Data did not support that. • Israel launches a new surprise attack operation in Lebanon. Under “Operation Eternal Darkness,” around 50 IAF jets struck roughly 100 Hezbollah targets across Beirut, southern Lebanon, and the Bekaa Valley in a concentrated wave. • Lebanese officials reported 300+ killed, 1000+ wounded The IDF said 220 were militants, including many senior commanders. • Lebanon declared April 9 a national day of mourning. • International backlash followed. Kaja Kallas and others called the strikes disproportionate and pushed to include Lebanon in the ceasefire. Thursday – situation escalates further • Saudi Arabia confirmed serious damage from Iranian strikes. About 600,000 barrels per day were knocked offline, with another 700,000 bpd affected via pipeline disruption. • Drone activity increased. Drones reported over Tehran, Tabriz, and Karaj. Iranian air defenses were activated across multiple regions. • Kuwait was struck after drones hit key facilities, including a National Guard site. • Iran hardened its position: no Lebanon ceasefire, no negotiations. Officials called Lebanon inseparable from any deal and warned of consequences. • Benjamin Netanyahu instructed his cabinet to begin preparing talks with Lebanon focused on disarming Hezbollah, while saying military operations will resume with force. • Israel also began preparing for renewed fighting in Gaza after a Hamas deadline expired. • Tensions with Pakistan escalated after its defense minister called for Israel’s destruction. Israel responded sharply. Continued 👇🏻 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：对于刚结束假期回到美国的各位，以下是你们错过的消息。周二 – 宣布两周停火 • 美国在伊朗境内大幅升级行动。袭击击中了卡拉杰、阿拉克和布什尔。五角大楼正在积极权衡后续步骤，包括对发电厂以及战略和核基础设施进行更深度的打击。 • 伊朗以重大威胁作为回应。伊斯兰革命卫队官员警告称，他们可能会切断对西方长达数年的石油和天然气供应。霍尔木兹海峡实际上受到限制，对全球能源市场造成了直接压力。 • 巴基斯坦介入调解。总理夏巴兹·谢里夫和陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔直接与特朗普总统和JD·万斯进行了交谈。 • 特朗普随后宣布美伊之间停火两周。条件很明确：伊朗必须完全重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。他形容伊朗的10点提议是“可行的”，并表示协议已接近达成。 • 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希表示，如果针对伊朗的袭击停止，伊朗将保证两周内通过海峡的安全通行。 • 几分钟内，导弹还是向以色列发射了。特拉维夫和以色列南部响起了警报。 • 核心争议由此开始：伊朗和巴基斯坦将停火视为区域性的，包括黎巴嫩和真主党。美国和以色列则称其仅直接适用于伊朗。万斯后来称这是一种“误解”。 • 美伊直接会谈原定于伊斯兰堡举行。周三 – 停火开始破裂 • 最大问题：霍尔木兹海峡从未真正重新开放。交通量保持极低。只有少数船只移动，且大多未运载真正的原油。 • 白宫称伊朗正在退让。独立的航运数据显示事实恰恰相反。 • 美国石油高管也直接介入，强烈反对任何由伊朗控制或对通过海峡的航运征税的方案。 • 伊朗指责阿联酋参与了对其领土的袭击，随后伊朗打击了沙特的能源和天然气管道及基础设施。 • 穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫公开拒绝了停火框架的部分内容，坚持认为只有伊朗的10点计划是可以接受的。 • 万斯澄清了美国的立场：停火不适用于黎巴嫩。他还声称航运正在改善。数据并不支持这一点。 • 以色列在黎巴嫩发动了新的突袭行动。在“永恒黑暗行动”下，约50架以色列空军喷气式飞机在贝鲁特、黎巴嫩南部和贝卡谷地发动了集中波次的打击，袭击了约100个真主党目标。 • 黎巴嫩官员报告称有300多人死亡，1000多人受伤。以色列国防军称其中220人是武装分子，包括许多高级指挥官。 • 黎巴嫩宣布4月9日为全国哀悼日。 • 随后引发国际强烈反对。卡娅·卡拉斯等人称袭击不成比例，并推动将黎巴嫩纳入停火范围。周四 – 局势进一步升级 • 沙特阿拉伯证实伊朗的袭击造成了严重破坏。每天约60万桶的产能被切断，另有70万桶/日的产能因管道中断受到影响。 • 无人机活动增加。据报道，德黑兰、大不里士和卡拉杰上空出现了无人机。伊朗在多个地区启动了防空系统。 • 科威特在无人机袭击了包括国民警卫队驻地在内的关键设施后遭到打击。 • 伊朗立场强硬：没有黎巴嫩停火，就没有谈判。官员们称黎巴嫩与任何协议都不可分割，并警告会有后果。 • 本雅明·内塔尼亚胡指示其内阁开始准备与黎巴嫩进行以解除真主党武装为重点的会谈，同时表示军事行动将强力恢复。 • 以色列还在哈马斯最后期限到期后，开始为加沙重新开战做准备。 • 在巴基斯坦国防部长呼吁摧毁以色列后，与巴基斯坦的紧张局势升级。以色列做出了尖锐回应。继续 👇🏻 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran is insisting Hezbollah be included in any ceasefire, threatening to keep the Strait of Hormuz closed otherwise. At the same time, Hezbollah, which sits in Lebanon’s government while maintaining a military wing, has just launched multiple ballistic missiles at Tel Aviv right now. Hard to see Israel agreeing to halt strikes on Lebanon under these conditions. That window may have just closed. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗坚持将真主党纳入任何停火协议，否则威胁要保持霍尔木兹海峡关闭。与此同时，在黎巴嫩政府中占有一席之地并维持军事派别的真主党，刚刚向特拉维夫发射了多枚弹道导弹。在这种情况下，很难看到以色列会同意停止对黎巴嫩的打击。那个窗口可能刚刚关闭。 推文

text: 🇸🇦 700,000 barrels per day cut from Saudi oil production due to US/Israel imposed war on Iran — Saudi Press. The East-West pipeline suffered significant damage from recent attacks. Further conflict is predicted to lead to further reduction of supply and volatility of global oil markets.
text_zh: 🇸🇦 由于美以对伊朗发动的战争，沙特石油产量每天减少70万桶 — 沙特新闻社。东西向管道在最近的袭击中遭受了重大破坏。预计进一步的冲突将导致供应进一步减少和全球石油市场的波动。

The base is known to house US forces. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2042365397110755412/video/1 US forces are engaging hostile drones over Erbil Governorate in northern Iraq, these minutes. At least one interception noted. The drones likely belong to Iran-backed militias. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2042364645227307480/video/1 - Status-6 (War & Military News) tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇵🇰 "Israel is evil and a curse for humanity, while peace talks are underway in Islamabad, genocide is being committed in Lebanon. Innocent citizens are being killed by Israel, first Gaza, then Iran and now Lebanon, bloodletting continues unabated. I hope and…" 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 Israel views very gravely these blatant antisemitic blood libels from a government claiming to “mediate peace”. - Israeli Foreign Minister did not like the post from the Minister of Defense of Pakistan. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇵🇰 “以色列是邪恶的，是人类的诅咒，当伊斯兰堡正在进行和平谈判时，黎巴嫩正在发生种族灭绝。无辜的公民正在被以色列杀害，先是加沙，然后是伊朗，现在是黎巴嫩，流血事件持续不断。我希望……” 🇮🇱 🇵🇰 以色列非常严肃地看待这些来自一个声称“调解和平”的政府的公然反犹太血腥诽谤。 - 以色列外交部长不喜欢巴基斯坦国防部长的这篇帖子。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 Another tanker turned around in the Strait of Hormuz, however this one was trying to transit via the Iranian approved route. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 另一艘油轮在霍尔木兹海峡掉头，但这艘船试图通过伊朗批准的路线。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF released footage of a strike on a Hezbollah rocket launching position in southern Lebanon. They report to have destroyed about 10 launchers so far. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发布了打击黎巴嫩南部真主党火箭发射阵地的视频。他们报告称目前已摧毁了约10个发射器。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The White House has warned staff not to place bets on prediction markets amid the Iran war following suspiciously timed trades tied to U.S. policy shifts. The warning comes after a surge in oil futures trading shortly before a strike pause announcement and reports of large profits from correctly timed ceasefire bets, though officials say there is no evidence of insider trading. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：白宫已警告员工不要在伊朗战争期间在预测市场上进行投注，此前曾出现与美国政策转变相关的可疑时机交易。该警告是在停火公告发布前不久石油期货交易激增，以及有关从精准时机的停火投注中获得巨额利润的报道之后发出的，尽管官员们表示没有证据表明存在内幕交易。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Qalibaf: Time is running out ...
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 卡利巴夫：时间不多了……

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Canadian Foreign Minister Anand condemned Israel's strikes on Lebanon, urging them to respect Lebanon's territorial sovereignty. She also called on Hezbollah to disarm immediately and respect the decisions by the Lebanese government. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 加拿大外交部长阿南德谴责以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击，敦促他们尊重黎巴嫩的领土主权。她还呼吁真主党立即解除武装并尊重黎巴嫩政府的决定。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Iran's IRGC Navy: Over these two days of the agreement, both the enemy and the friend have experienced and clearly understood that the management of the Strait of Hormuz has entered a new phase.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军：在这两天的协议期间，敌人和朋友都经历并清楚地理解到，霍尔木兹海峡的管理已进入了一个新阶段。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ Iran said the reports of the country's delegation arriving in Islamabad are false, and that until the United States fulfills its commitments regarding Lebanon, the negotiations are suspended.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 伊朗表示，有关该国代表团抵达伊斯兰堡的报道是不实的，在美方履行有关黎巴嫩的承诺之前，谈判已暂停。

text: ⚡️ 🇦🇺 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The Australian ambassador in Lebanon, Tom Wilson, donates blood to the wounded of the Israeli aggression in Lebanon yesterday. @wfwitness
